metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins by MisterVitoPro

plugins.name: qa-swarm
plugins.description: AI-powered code quality analyzer: specialized agents find security, performance, architecture, and correctness issues, then fix them via TDD

plugins.name: code-atlas
plugins.description: Scan a codebase and generate a comprehensive architecture index for CLAUDE.md — directory map, key files, tech stack, patterns, dependencies, and build commands

plugins.name: plan-runner
plugins.description: Take a Markdown implementation plan, run it through a parallel agent swarm with per-wave verification, and generate a bug-fix plan for re-runs

plugins.name: jupiter
plugins.description: Consolidate scattered specs into a canonical master-spec tree with a navigable index, and append stubs for undocumented public surface found in code
